hypothesis.original_question: Replacing sucrose with trehalose as a cryoprotectant in the freezing medium will increase post-thaw viability of HeLa cells by at least 15 percentage points compared to the standard DMSO protocol, due to trehalose's superior membrane stabilization at low temperatures.

refined.intervention: Substitute trehalose for sucrose in DMSO-based freezing medium for HeLa cells
refined.outcome: Post-thaw viability (trypan blue exclusion + Annexin V/PI flow)
refined.threshold: ≥15 percentage points improvement vs DMSO-only control
refined.mechanism: Trehalose stabilises lipid bilayers via hydrogen bonding to phosphate headgroups during dehydration, reducing membrane fracture

references.title: Trehalose as a cryoprotective additive: a study with mammalian cells
Membrane stabilization by trehalose during freezing

protocol.title: Prepare trehalose freezing medium

failure_warnings.mitigation: Pre-incubate cells in 0.1 M trehalose-supplemented growth medium for 1 hour before freezing to allow membrane equilibration

protocol.rationale: Combine trehalose, DMSO, and FBS to make 10mL of cryopreservation medium. Filter sterilize through 0.22 µm filter. Pre-warm to 4°C in the cold room.

protocol.title: Harvest HeLa cells
protocol.rationale: Trypsinise confluent HeLa cells from T75 flasks. Quench with growth medium, pellet at 200g for 5 minutes, wash once with PBS.

protocol.title: Aliquot into cryovials

failure_warnings.mitigation: Resuspend at exactly 2×10⁶ cells/mL — densities above 5×10⁶ promote intracellular ice formation

protocol.rationale: Resuspend cell pellet in trehalose freezing medium at 2×10⁶ cells/mL. Pipette 1mL aliquots into labelled cryovials. Keep on ice during aliquotting.

protocol.title: Controlled-rate freezing

failure_warnings.mitigation: Use Mr. Frosty container with fresh isopropanol — cooling rate must be 1°C/minute. Verify isopropanol level before each use.

protocol.rationale: Place cryovials in Mr. Frosty controlled-rate freezing container at -80°C overnight to achieve 1°C/minute cooling. Transfer to liquid nitrogen the next morning.

protocol.title: Rapid thaw and seed

failure_warnings.mitigation: Use a 37°C water bath, agitate vial gently, remove the moment ice crystal disappears (~90 s). Do NOT let vial sit warm.

protocol.rationale: Remove vial from LN2, immediately submerge in 37°C water bath. Once thawed, transfer cells dropwise into 9mL pre-warmed DMEM. Pellet, resuspend, seed into T25.

protocol.title: Measure post-thaw viability
protocol.rationale: Read viability immediately and at 24h post-thaw using trypan blue exclusion (manual count) and Annexin V/PI flow cytometry. Compare trehalose vs DMSO-only control by unpaired t-test (p<0.05).

success_criteria: ≥15 pp increase in 24h viability vs DMSO-only
p<0.05 by unpaired t-test, n≥3 biological replicates
